actionCalls.name: Shift_Sign_Out_Notice_to_Employee
actionCalls.label: Shift Sign Out Notice to Employee

rules.name: Reminder_to_sign_out
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 8 AND ( 6 OR 7 )
rules.label: Reminder to sign out

rules.name: Employee_confirm_reminder_before_shift_2h
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND ( 7 OR 8 )
rules.label: Employee confirm reminder before shift (2h)

Flow.description: Reminder to sign out, Employee confirm reminder before shift (2h), Manager Confirmation Alert, UpdateStart&EndTime-GMT, UpdateStart&EndTime-BST, Update Total Break

formulas.name: CalculateEndTimeBST
formulas.expression:
IF( VALUE( MID( TEXT( If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Billable_End_Time__c}),If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Actual_End_Time__c}), {!$Record.sirenum__Scheduled_End_Time__c},{!$Record.sirenum__Actual_End_Time__c}),{!$Record.sirenum__Billable_End_Time__c})
+ 1/24
), 12, 2 ) ) = 0, "00", If(VALUE( MID( TEXT( If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Billable_End_Time__c}),If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Actual_End_Time__c}), {!$Record.sirenum__Scheduled_End_Time__c},{!$Record.sirenum__Actual_End_Time__c}),{!$Record.sirenum__Billable_End_Time__c})
+ 1/24 ), 12, 2 ) ) = 12 , "12", IF(VALUE( MID( TEXT(If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Billable_End_Time__c}),If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Actual_End_Time__c}), {!$Record.sirenum__Scheduled_End_Time__c},{!$Record.sirenum__Actual_End_Time__c}),{!$Record.sirenum__Billable_End_Time__c}) + 1/24 ), 12, 2 ) )<10,'0'&TEXT(VALUE( MID( TEXT( If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Billable_End_Time__c}), If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Actual_End_Time__c}), {!$Record.sirenum__Scheduled_End_Time__c},{!$Record.sirenum__Actual_End_Time__c}),{!$Record.sirenum__Billable_End_Time__c}) + 1/24 ), 12, 2 ) )), TEXT(VALUE( MID( TEXT( If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Billable_End_Time__c}),If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Actual_End_Time__c}), {!$Record.sirenum__Scheduled_End_Time__c},{!$Record.sirenum__Actual_End_Time__c}),{!$Record.sirenum__Billable_End_Time__c}) + 1/24 ), 12, 2 ) )) ) ) ) & ":" & MID( TEXT( If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Billable_End_Time__c}), If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Actual_End_Time__c}), {!$Record.sirenum__Scheduled_End_Time__c},{!$Record.sirenum__Actual_End_Time__c}),{!$Record.sirenum__Billable_End_Time__c})
+ 1/24 ), 15, 2 )

formulas.name: CalculateEndTimeGMT
CalculateStartTimeBST
formulas.expression:
IF( VALUE( MID( TEXT( If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Billable_Start_Time__c}),If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Actual_Start_Time__c}), {!$Record.sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c},{!$Record.sirenum__Actual_Start_Time__c}),{!$Record.sirenum__Billable_Start_Time__c})
+ 1/24
), 12, 2 ) ) = 0, "00", If(VALUE( MID( TEXT( If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Billable_Start_Time__c}),If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Actual_Start_Time__c}), {!$Record.sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c},{!$Record.sirenum__Actual_Start_Time__c}),{!$Record.sirenum__Billable_Start_Time__c})
+ 1/24 ), 12, 2 ) ) = 12 , "12", IF(VALUE( MID( TEXT(If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Billable_Start_Time__c}),If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Actual_Start_Time__c}), {!$Record.sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c},{!$Record.sirenum__Actual_Start_Time__c}),{!$Record.sirenum__Billable_Start_Time__c}) + 1/24 ), 12, 2 ) )<10,'0'&TEXT(VALUE( MID( TEXT( If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Billable_Start_Time__c}), If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Actual_Start_Time__c}), {!$Record.sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c},{!$Record.sirenum__Actual_Start_Time__c}),{!$Record.sirenum__Billable_Start_Time__c}) + 1/24 ), 12, 2 ) )), TEXT(VALUE( MID( TEXT( If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Billable_Start_Time__c}),If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Actual_Start_Time__c}), {!$Record.sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c},{!$Record.sirenum__Actual_Start_Time__c}),{!$Record.sirenum__Billable_Start_Time__c}) + 1/24 ), 12, 2 ) )) ) ) ) & ":" & MID( TEXT( If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Billable_Start_Time__c}), If(ISNULL({!$Record.sirenum__Actual_Start_Time__c}), {!$Record.sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c},{!$Record.sirenum__Actual_Start_Time__c}),{!$Record.sirenum__Billable_Start_Time__c})
+ 1/24 ), 15, 2 )

formulas.name: CalculateStartTimeGMT

Flow.interviewLabel: Shift: reminder Sign out, Emp Confirm, Update Start & End Time(BST, GMT), and Total Break) {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Shift: reminder Signout, Emp Confirm, Update Start & End Time(BST, GMT), and Total Break)
